raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, such as the 'first' claim and the coverage claims.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against multiple prior works (Lei & Candès, Alaa et al., Nie & Wager) and clearly articulates the delta between CalDML and these works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific details for each citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, such as the exact publication year/venue of Kennedy's DR-learner paper and the venue of Alaa et al.'s conformal meta-learners paper.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all substantive concerns and structural issues within the scope of the review.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as engaging with Lei & Candès (2021) and Alaa et al. (2023)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, such as the 'first' claim and the coverage claims.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against multiple prior works (Lei & Candès, Alaa et al., Nie & Wager) and clearly articulates the delta between CalDML and these works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific details for each citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, such as the exact publication year/venue of Kennedy's DR-learner paper and the venue of Alaa et al.'s conformal meta-learners paper.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all substantive concerns and structural issues within the scope of the review.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as engaging with Lei & Candès (2021) and Alaa et al. (2023).
